experience.description: Conducted extensive field research on local boutique and big-box retail environments to identify successful sales closing techniques and customer engagement strategies. Compiled data on consumer traffic patterns and the impact of visual merchandising on impulse purchasing behavior.

Applied researched interpersonal communication frameworks to advocate for community programs. Actively practiced consultative social skills to identify resident needs and provide appropriate program recommendations, mirroring a retail sales approach.

metadata.experience_level: Relevant research done for the job field.
